rules.rule: No compat shims, aliases for retired names, or migration helpers. A rename replaces every call site in the same change.
Python 3.15+ under the Rasm doctrine: typed result rails, ruff and ty clean, polymorphic dispatch over function proliferation, uv-only package custody.
Doppler owns all secret custody. Credential values, tokens, or DSNs inlined in code, compose files, or docs are defects.
